sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: PRPL SEC Filings - Purple Innovatio 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides a comprehensive resource for Purple Innovation (PRPL) SEC filings, including 10-K annual reports, 10-Q quarterly earnings, and 8-K material events, with AI-powered summaries and impact analysis. The filings offer detailed insights into the company's financial condition, business strategy, and governance. Recent activities covered include Q3 2025 financial results, a significant shareholding report by SomniGroup, and amendments to executive compensation agreements.

feed.title: Quetta Acquisition Corporation (NASDAQ: QETA) files Form 12b-25 for late 10-K
feed.summary: Quetta Acquisition Corporation (QETA) has filed a Form 12b-25 notification with the SEC, indicating that it will be late in filing its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. The delay is attributed to difficulties in completing the financial statements for the report, which the company states could not be resolved without unreasonable effort or expense. QETA anticipates filing the Annual Report within fifteen calendar days following the original prescribed due date.

feed.title: Q/C Technologies (NASDAQ: QCLS) files Form 12b-25 delaying 2025 10-K
feed.summary: Q/C Technologies, Inc. (QCLS) has filed a Form 12b-25, indicating that it will be unable to file its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the year ended December 31, 2025, on time. The company requires additional time to complete and finalize its financial statements and anticipates filing the Form 10-K within fifteen calendar days after the prescribed due date. This routine late-filing notice was signed by Executive Chairman Joshua Silverman on March 31, 2026, and does not suggest any financial restatements.

feed.title: Protagonist Therapeutics stock hits all-time high at 105.71 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Protagonist Therapeutics (PTGX) stock has reached an all-time high of $105.71, currently trading at $105.99, demonstrating a 125.11% increase over the past year. Analysts predict profitability this year with earnings of $3.78 per share, despite the stock appearing overvalued. Recent FDA approval for its psoriasis drug, Icotyde, has further boosted investor confidence and led to multiple analyst price target increases.

feed.title: Phreesia (NYSE: PHR) outlines $24B opportunity and AccessOne expansion
feed.summary: Phreesia (NYSE: PHR) has detailed its platform growth and a $24 billion total addressable market opportunity, showcasing its diversified revenue model across subscriptions, payment solutions, and Network Solutions. The company's recent acquisition of AccessOne expands its healthcare payment and financing capabilities, while it highlights its integrated software and patient engagement platform's role in supporting 180 million patient visits in fiscal 2026. Phreesia also reported a net income of $2.3 million for fiscal year 2026, a significant improvement from a net loss in the previous fiscal year, and has refinanced a bridge loan with a new $275 million revolving credit facility.

feed.title: Patriot National Bancorp 10-K: Total interest $47.8M, EPS $(0.17)
feed.summary: Patriot National Bancorp (PNBK) reported total interest and dividend income of $47.8 million and a net loss of $12.7 million, or $(0.17) per share. Despite an increase in non-interest income and improved credit trends, higher operating expenses and lower loan balances led to a decline in net interest income. The company focused on balance sheet repositioning and liquidity enhancement, resulting in an improved net loss compared to the prior year.

feed.title: CEO Steven Sugarman receives 2,089,043 Patriot (PNBK) shares
feed.summary: Patriot National Bancorp's President and CEO, Steven Sugarman, received 2,089,043 shares of voting common stock from the vesting of 4,049,593 restricted stock units (RSUs) on March 25, 2026. The remaining 1,960,550 RSU shares were withheld to cover tax obligations. Following this transaction, Sugarman directly holds 2,089,043 shares, with an additional 9,019,978 shares held indirectly through a living trust.

feed.title: Pony AI (PONY) VP sells 22,946 shares in mandatory tax sell-to-cover
feed.summary: Pony AI Inc. Vice President Zhang Ning sold 22,946 Class A Ordinary Shares at $8.6875 per share in a mandatory sell-to-cover transaction. This sale was non-discretionary and intended to cover income tax liabilities from vested restricted stock units. After the transaction, Zhang Ning directly holds 612,539 Class A Ordinary Shares.

feed.title: Plus Therapeutics Reports Granting of Inducement Awards Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
feed.summary: Plus Therapeutics, Inc. announced the granting of inducement awards to two new employees. These awards, consisting of stock options and restricted stock units, were issued under the Company's 2015 New Employee Incentive Plan and approved by the Compensation Committee as required by Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4) to entice new talent. The awards vest over several years, contingent on continued employment.

feed.title: CPI Card Group (PMTS) officer nets more shares as RSUs vest
feed.summary: CPI Card Group Inc.'s Controller & Chief Accounting Officer, Donna Abbey Carmignani, exercised 371 restricted stock units (RSUs) into common shares on March 29, 2026. To cover mandatory taxes, 104 shares were withheld by the company, resulting in a net increase of 267 shares to her direct holdings, totaling 10,184 common shares. This transaction represents a routine compensation vesting and not an open-market sale.

feed.title: Public Policy Holding (NASDAQ: PPHC) grows to $186.5M revenue with global expansion
feed.summary: Public Policy Holding Company (PPHC) achieved $186.5 million in revenue for 2025, marking a 27.6% compound annual growth rate since 2018, driven by both organic growth and strategic acquisitions like TrailRunner and Pine Cove. Despite reporting a net loss of $39.0 million, the company generated a strong Adjusted EBITDA of $45.4 million, reflecting underlying profitability and successful expansion into global markets and diverse strategic communications services. PPHC plans to continue its growth strategy through further acquisitions and development of digital and data capabilities.

feed.title: Director at Polyrizon (PLRZ) sells 100 shares, retains 4,069
feed.summary: Polyrizon Ltd. director Carmel Liron reported an open-market sale of 100 Ordinary Shares at $11.00 per share on March 30, 2026. Following this transaction, Liron directly holds 4,069 ordinary shares, which include 1,463 unrestricted shares and 2,606 restricted ordinary shares that vest quarterly conditional on continued service. The filing also clarifies that no derivative securities were involved in this transaction.

feed.title: Polyrizon (PLRZ) CEO sells 3,900 shares, holding 32,012 afterward
feed.summary: Polyrizon Ltd.'s CEO, Tomer Izraeli, sold 3,900 Ordinary Shares at $10.90 per share in an open-market transaction on March 30, 2026. Following this sale, Izraeli directly holds 32,012 Ordinary Shares, which comprise both unrestricted and restricted shares. The restricted shares consist of 53 that vest monthly and 25,000 that vest quarterly, all subject to his continued service to the company.

feed.title: Polyrizon (PLRZ) CTO trims stake with 2,917-share open-market sale
feed.summary: Polyrizon Ltd.'s Chief Technology Officer, Tidhar Turgeman, has sold 2,917 Ordinary Shares at $10.90 per share in an open-market transaction, as reported in a recent Form 4 filing. Following this sale, Turgeman directly holds 17,518 Ordinary Shares, which include 18 restricted shares vesting monthly and 17,500 restricted shares vesting quarterly, contingent on his continued employment. The transaction is categorized as a neutral filing impact with a negative sentiment, reflecting a routine insider sale rather than a grant or option exercise.

feed.title: Auditor change at Playboy Inc. (NASDAQ: PLBY) as RSM replaces BDO
feed.summary: Playboy, Inc. (NASDAQ: PLBY) has changed its independent registered public accounting firm, dismissing BDO USA, P.C. on March 26, 2026, and engaging RSM US LLP on March 31, 2026, for the year ending December 31, 2026. The company stated there were no disagreements with BDO on accounting principles or audit procedures, and BDO had issued clean opinions for 2024 and 2025 financial statements. However, previously disclosed material weaknesses in internal control over financial reporting remain unremediated.

feed.title: Buy Rating on PepGen: DM1 Program De-Risked by Stronger Underlying Biology and Upside from Higher-Dose Cohorts
feed.summary: H.C. Wainwright analyst Ananda Ghosh maintained a Buy rating on PepGen Inc. with a $20.00 price target. Ghosh believes PepGen's DM1 program is de-risked due to stronger underlying biology observed in treated patients, despite a modest average splicing correction skewed by an anomalous patient. The analyst anticipates significant upside from higher-dose cohorts, expecting materially higher splicing correction which could serve as a key value inflection point for the stock.

feed.title: Bragar Eagel & Squire Urges Picard Medical Investors to Contact Firm Before April 3 Deadline
feed.summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. has filed a class action lawsuit against Picard Medical, Inc. (NYSE:PMI) alleging a fraudulent stock promotion scheme and insider trading. The lawsuit claims Picard failed to disclose that its stock price crash was due to misinformation and coordinated share dumping. Investors who purchased Picard securities between September 2, 2025, and October 31, 2025, are urged to contact the firm before the April 3, 2026, deadline to apply as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC Is Investigating ePlus, inc. (PLUS) And Encourages Stockholders to Connect
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC is investigating potential claims against ePlus, inc. (NASDAQ: PLUS) after the company announced financial results for Q3 2025 that missed consensus estimates. The shortfall was attributed to "digestion" in the networking space and with specific enterprise customers, as well as supply chain issues. Following this news, ePlus's stock price dropped by 13.1%.

feed.title: Update: Palisade Bio Shares Fall After Phase 1b Data on PALI-2108 in Fibrostenotic Crohn's Disease
feed.summary: This article reports on Palisade Bio's stock performance following the release of Phase 1b data for PALI-2108 in patients with fibrostenotic Crohn's disease. The data indicated that three of five subjects experienced adverse events which were considered treatment-related, leading to a decline in the company's shares. Despite this, the clinical trial will continue into a multi-dose portion, exploring different dosing strategies.

feed.title: Pebblebrook Hotel price target raised to $14 from $12 at Truist
feed.summary: Truist has increased its price target for Pebblebrook Hotel (PEB) shares from $12 to $14, while maintaining a Hold rating. The firm anticipates strong performance for the REIT in 2026, driven by San Francisco's recovery, easier comparisons, specific one-time events in 2026, and disposition activities reducing leverage. This outlook suggests optimism for the company's future financial trajectory.

feed.title: PureCycle Technologies Sees Unusually Large Options Volume (NASDAQ:PCT)
feed.summary: PureCycle Technologies (NASDAQ:PCT) experienced unusually high call option volume on Tuesday, with investors purchasing 26,715 call options, a 115% increase over the typical daily volume. This surge in bullish options activity comes despite the company reporting a significant earnings and revenue miss and demonstrating severely negative profitability. Shares are trading near their 12-month low, yet analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $13.00.

feed.title: PureCycle Technologies (PCT) CFO details shares and stock options
feed.summary: PureCycle Technologies Inc. CFO Donald Carpenter filed an initial Form 3, disclosing his direct ownership of 135,539 shares of Common Stock. The filing also details four blocks of employee stock options totaling 58,824 underlying common shares, with exercise prices ranging from $5.72 to $10.58 and expiration dates between 2033 and 2036. A key detail highlights that the exercise of these nonqualified awards is contingent upon a three-year vesting period from the grant date.

feed.title: Rosenblatt Securities Maintains Penguin Solutions(PENG.US) With Buy Rating, Maintains Target Price $30
feed.summary: Rosenblatt Securities has reiterated its Buy rating on Penguin Solutions (PENG.US), maintaining a target price of $30. This suggests the firm continues to see significant upside potential for the company's stock. The report by Rosenblatt indicates a sustained positive outlook for Penguin Solutions.

feed.title: [144] OUTFRONT Media Inc. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article reports on an SEC Form 144 filing by OUTFRONT Media Inc. (OUT) dated March 31, 2026. The filing indicates a proposed sale of 50,000 shares of common stock with an aggregate market value of $1,291,288.67. The shares were acquired through restricted stock vesting on February 20, 2025, and are being sold through Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC.

feed.title: Nucor Corporation Trade Ideas — LSX:851918
feed.summary: This article compiles various trading ideas and technical analyses for Nucor Corporation (LSX:851918, NYSE:NUE) from different traders on TradingView. The ideas range from specific buy/sell recommendations with target and stop prices to broader analyses based on technical indicators like bullish pennants, head and shoulders patterns, Fibonacci retracements, and DMA support. Many traders highlight Nucor's strong fundamentals and position in the steel industry, with some noting its dividend increase and potential for growth fueled by infrastructure spending.

feed.title: Newmont Announces First Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call
feed.summary: Newmont Corporation will release its first quarter 2026 financial results after North American markets close on Thursday, April 23, 2026. A conference call is scheduled for the same day at 5:30 p.m. Eastern Daylight Time to discuss these results. Details for attending the webcast and analyst registration for Q&A are provided, with materials available on the company's website.

feed.title: Lennox International (LII) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
feed.summary: This article reports that Lennox International (LII) surpassed both earnings and revenue estimates for its second quarter. The company's adjusted earnings per share were $3.89, exceeding the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $3.29. Additionally, Lennox recorded revenues of $1.51 billion, which also beat the estimated $1.47 billion.

feed.title: Honeywell International Inc. (HON) Increases Yet Falls Behind Market: What Investors Need to Know
feed.summary: Honeywell International Inc. (HON) saw a 1.14% increase in the last trading session but underperformed major indices like the S&P 500, Dow, and Nasdaq. The company is set to release its earnings report on April 23, 2026, with analysts expecting a year-over-year decline in earnings per share and revenue. HON currently holds a Zacks Rank of #3 (Hold) and is trading at a premium compared to its industry, with a Forward P/E of 21.44 against the industry average of 16.45.

feed.title: Evergy awards $10,000 grants to three Kansas nonprofits
feed.summary: Evergy has announced that three Kansas nonprofits will each receive grants of up to $10,000 as part of its 2026 Connecting for Good Hometown Grants program. This initiative aims to support local organizations working to improve communities in the region.

feed.title: Amazon v. Perplexity: Courts Weigh Authorization, Consent, and Agentic AI
feed.summary: The article discusses the ongoing legal battle between Amazon and Perplexity AI, focusing on how courts are addressing the application of computer-access laws to agentic AI systems. The U.S. District Court for the Northern District of California initially granted Amazon a preliminary injunction, distinguishing user permission from platform authorization, but later issued an administrative stay pending appellate review. This case highlights critical questions about whose authorization matters when AI agents act on behalf of users—the user's, the platform's, or both—as AI technology continues to evolve.

feed.title: BRIEF-POET Technologies Q4 EPS USD -0.32
feed.summary: POET Technologies reported its Q4 earnings per share (EPS) as USD -0.32. This brief announcement was made by Refinitiv and is less than one minute in read time.

feed.title: Las Vegas Rolls The Dice On ‘All-Inclusive’ Hotel Offers
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International is introducing "all-inclusive" packages at its Luxor and Excalibur hotels on the Las Vegas Strip, starting April 6th. These packages aim to provide a more predictable vacation cost for travelers facing rising gas prices and airfare, bundling hotel stays, resort fees, dining, entertainment tickets, and parking. While not traditional all-inclusive like Caribbean resorts, the offerings provide structured meals and pre-selected entertainment to help guests manage their budget.

feed.title: Q/C Technologies Delays Annual 10-K Filing Briefly
feed.summary: Q/C Technologies (QCLS) has announced a delay in filing its Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, due to needing more time to finalize financial statements. The company expects to file within 15 calendar days of the original SEC deadline and does not anticipate any significant changes to its operating results compared to the prior fiscal year. This delay is framed as a short, procedural extension, not indicative of major financial issues or external investigations.

feed.title: Pacific Biosciences of California unveils oncology workflow solutions at industry event
feed.summary: Pacific Biosciences of California is presenting its HiFi sequencing technology and Vega system at the AACR26 conference in San Diego. The company aims to showcase how its solutions can enhance oncology workflows and provide comprehensive insights into cancer biology with high accuracy. This demonstration builds on previous advancements in HiFi sequencing for detailed cancer variation analysis and automated epigenetic data detection.

feed.title: PEOPLES BANCORP INC. TO ANNOUNCE 1ST QUARTER 2026 EARNINGS AND CONDUCT CONFERENCE CALL ON APRIL 21, 2026
feed.summary: Peoples Bancorp Inc. (Nasdaq: PEBO) announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 earnings before market open on April 21, 2026, and conduct a conference call at 11:00 a.m. EDT. The call will feature commentary from President and CEO Tyler Wilcox and CFO Kathryn Bailey, followed by a Q&A session. A webcast and archived replay will be available on the company's website.

feed.title: PLDT, Smart ready to limit access to Roblox
feed.summary: PLDT Inc. and Smart Communications, Inc. have announced their readiness to restrict access to Roblox following government concerns about the platform's safety for children. This decision comes after reports of exploited user-generated content leading to potential abuse and violent extremism on the platform. The National Telecommunications Commission (NTC) is collaborating with industry partners to assess appropriate actions to create a safer digital environment for children.

feed.title: (PAY) Volatility Zones as Tactical Triggers
feed.summary: This article from Stock Traders Daily discusses Paymentus Holdings Inc. Class A (NYSE: PAY), highlighting stable neutral readings in shorter horizons which could ease a long-term weak bias. It outlines an exceptional short setup with a 60.1:1 risk-reward ratio and provides three distinct AI-generated trading strategies tailored for different risk profiles. The analysis also includes multi-timeframe signal analysis, identifying support and resistance levels.

feed.title: Palladyne AI (PDYN) CFO discloses tax-related share sale
feed.summary: Palladyne AI Corp.'s Chief Financial Officer, Trevor Thatcher, sold 3,030 shares of common stock at a weighted-average price of $5.5463 per share. This sale was explicitly made to cover income tax liabilities from vesting restricted stock unit awards, not as a discretionary trade. Following the transaction, Thatcher directly owns 180,258 shares, including shares represented by RSUs.

feed.title: Oramed (NASDAQ: ORMP) CSO uses 435,084 shares to cover RSU tax
feed.summary: Oramed Pharmaceuticals Inc.'s Chief Scientific Officer, Miriam Kidron, reported a tax-related disposition of 435,084 common shares to cover tax withholding obligations from vested Restricted Stock Units. The shares were valued at $3.31 each. Following this transaction, Kidron directly holds 1,133,138 shares of Oramed common stock.

feed.title: Rinzimetostat Phase 3 dose and cash runway update from ORIC (NASDAQ: ORIC)
feed.summary: ORIC Pharmaceuticals announced it is advancing rinzimetostat (ORIC-944) to Phase 3 at a 400 mg once-daily dose in combination with darolutamide for metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer, based on favorable efficacy and a differentiated safety profile from Phase 1b optimization data. The company reported strong PSA responses and a good tolerability profile at this dose, with fewer adverse events and dose modifications compared to higher doses or competitor regimens. ORIC also updated its financial position, showing approximately $412 million in cash and investments, providing a cash runway into the second half of 2028, sufficient to execute planned registrational trials for rinzimetostat and another late-stage candidate, enozertinib.

feed.title: Director-linked entity boosts PagSeguro (NYSE: PAGS) stake with 498K-share buy
feed.summary: PagSeguro Digital Ltd. director Luis Frias, through an indirectly linked corporation, purchased 498,500 Class A common shares across two transactions on March 27, 2026. The purchase involved 249,250 shares at $9.99 and another 249,250 shares at $9.94, totaling approximately $4.97 million. These transactions have significantly increased the indirect holdings of Class A shares for entities linked to Frias.

feed.title: Onconetix CEO Karina Fedasz to step down, David White to succeed
feed.summary: Onconetix (ONCO) announced that Karina Fedasz will step down as interim CEO, with David White appointed as her successor, effective March 18. Fedasz will remain as interim CFO. Sammy Dorf has also been appointed to the company's board of directors and audit committee.

feed.title: [ARS] OLD REPUBLIC INTERNATIONAL CORP SEC Filing
authors: [ARS] OLD REPUBLIC INTERNATIONAL CORP SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces an ARS SEC filing by Old Republic International Corp (ORI). The filing, categorized as an Annual Report to Security Holders, was accepted on March 31, 2026, and indicates a low impact and neutral sentiment. The article provides details on the filing, including a link to the original document on SEC EDGAR, along with company overview, market rankings, and recent news.

feed.title: OPER Should I Buy
feed.summary: This page provides an analysis of the stock OPER for 2026, including its current price, analyst ratings, and financial data. It indicates that no Wall Street analysts currently forecast a rise in OPER's stock price, with zero buy, hold, or sell ratings. The page also shows no available growth, profitability, or efficiency data.

feed.title: Nexstar Tells Judge Aspects Of Tegna Merger "Cannot Be Reversed"
feed.summary: Nexstar Media Group has informed a judge that certain aspects of its merger with Tegna, which was temporarily halted by a restraining order, cannot be reversed immediately. The company warned the court that full compliance with the order would create operational harm, regulatory conflicts, and a governance vacuum, jeopardizing Nexstar and the Tegna assets. DirecTV, which successfully secured the restraining order based on antitrust claims, plans to file a response to Nexstar's assertions.

feed.title: Insider Sell: John Muse Sells 1,500 Shares of Nexstar Media Grou
feed.summary: John Muse, a Director at Nexstar Media Group Inc (NXST), sold 1,500 shares of the company on March 27, 2026, reducing his holding to 27,161 shares. This transaction is part of a broader trend of insider selling at Nexstar, with no insider buys and 42 insider sells recorded over the past year. The stock was trading at $219.63, and with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 1.17, GuruFocus indicates it is fairly valued.

feed.title: OFG Bancorp (OFG) director awarded 1,500 Restricted Units under incentive plan
feed.summary: OFG Bancorp director Sue Harnett was granted 1,500 Restricted Units under the company's 2007 Omnibus Performance Incentive Plan. These units, awarded at a stated price of $0.00, will convert to 1,500 shares of Common Stock upon the lapse of the Restricted Period on February 26, 2027. This transaction is a compensation grant and not a stock purchase, increasing Harnett's direct holdings of Restricted Units to 1,500.

feed.title: NextNRG to Launch the EzShop, Powered by Gopuff, to Deliver Both Fuel & Groceries Directly to Customers
feed.summary: NextNRG, Inc. announced the launch of EzShop, an integration within its EzFill mobile fueling platform, powered by Gopuff. This new service will allow customers to order over 5,000 everyday essentials, including groceries and household items, for delivery alongside their fuel. The partnership aims to transform NextNRG into a digital commerce platform, creating a new revenue stream and enhancing customer convenience by modernizing the traditional gas station experience.

feed.title: Organon (OGN) EVP gains shares via RSU vesting and tax withholding
feed.summary: Organon & Co.'s Executive VP, Corp. Dev., Daniel Karp, exercised 14,184 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) which converted into common stock. To cover tax obligations, 4,446 shares were withheld at a reference price of $5.84. Following these transactions, Karp directly holds 57,153.923 shares of Organon common stock.

feed.title: InspireMD to Participate in Upcoming 25th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference
feed.summary: InspireMD, Inc. (Nasdaq: NSPR) has announced its plans to present at the 25th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference. The presentation is scheduled for Tuesday, April 14th, at 12:45 pm Eastern Time. InspireMD develops the CGuard® Prime carotid stent system and aims to make its proprietary MicroNet™ mesh technology the industry standard for carotid stenting.
